overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking through a futuristic industrial district with large nuclear cooling towers, concrete infrastructure, and multi-lane roads. The scene features bright midday desert lighting with clear blue skies, sparse vehicle traffic, and a progression from open power plant areas to covered walkways under industrial overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: nuclear power plant exterior with cooling towers

events.description: camera passes the red abandoned vehicle parked along the industrial building

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk with large cooling towers dominating the background view

entered.detail: two massive hyperboloid cooling towers with steam vents, iconic nuclear plant structures
concrete industrial building with red painted pipes and metal walkways
derelict red car parked against the industrial building wall
wide multi-lane asphalt road with lane markings and scattered debris
network of red industrial pipes running along the building facade overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright industrial power plant area with massive cooling towers visible in the distance. The camera follows the character walking along a concrete sidewalk next to an industrial building with prominent red piping. A red abandoned vehicle sits parked along the wall as the character moves past it, with the wide asphalt road visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial intersection with roadside walkway

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the multi-lane road from right to left
moving from cooling tower proximity to roadside walkway alongside industrial perimeter wall

agents.ego_description: character moves through open industrial area and transitions to walking alongside the road with industrial complex visible in background

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall concrete perimeter wall with metal railings on top, enclosing the industrial facility
cylindrical industrial water storage tanks visible behind the perimeter wall
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the cooling towers into a more open industrial intersection. A futuristic vehicle drives past on the road as the scene transitions to walking alongside a tall concrete industrial perimeter wall. Water towers become visible behind the wall, and palm trees line the distant roadside under the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial roadside walkway with dry vegetation

events.description: large industrial megabuilding with glowing digital billboards comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the industrial wall, passing dry grass and vegetation

notable_agents.action: truck driving along the road in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: tall tiered industrial building with weathered concrete facade and large structural sections
large glowing digital billboards mounted on the industrial building showing colorful advertisements
futuristic street lamps with orange glowing light bars extending horizontally

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the concrete sidewalk with the industrial perimeter wall now close on the left. Dry vegetation and grass line the walkway. A massive industrial megabuilding with bright digital billboards emerges on the right, while futuristic orange street lights mark the roadside. Sparse vehicle traffic continues on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street approaching overpass with megabuilding

events.description: camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk, maintaining following distance
approaching large metal industrial overpass structure spanning the road ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking behind another pedestrian along the industrial sidewalk, approaching the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt and shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the overpass

entered.detail: large metal industrial bridge structure spanning across the road with walkway and pipes

segments.scene_description: The character follows a pedestrian walking ahead along the sidewalk, passing close to the massive industrial building with glowing digital advertisements. The scene transitions toward a large metal overpass structure that spans the road ahead. Orange street lights continue to line the path as the density of industrial infrastructure increases.

events.description: entering shadow cast by the overhead industrial overpass, lighting becomes darker and mixed
passing directly under the metal walkway structure of the overpass

agents.ego_description: character continues walking under the industrial overpass with metal structures overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian continuing to walk ahead under the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadow of the industrial overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to mixed lighting conditions. The camera moves under the massive metal walkway structure with industrial pipes and grating visible directly overhead. The pedestrian ahead continues walking through the covered area as the scene becomes more enclosed and sheltered.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright industrial power plant district that gradually transitions into a sheltered urban underpass. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside a building with red piping and a parked abandoned vehicle, with massive cooling towers looming in the distance. As the character moves away from the towers, the scene opens into a wide intersection where a futuristic vehicle passes by, shifting the perspective toward a tall perimeter wall lined with distant palm trees and water towers. The path then expands past dry vegetation and orange street lights toward a massive megabuilding adorned with glowing digital billboards, following a pedestrian toward a looming metal overpass. Finally, the camera moves from the brilliant midday sun into the deep shadows of the overpass, where the environment becomes enclosed by industrial pipes and metal grating overhead.
